description: A global movement to unite the world through music

event.name: Global Moment of Unity

song.title: Imagine
song.reason: This song represents unity and hope for a better world. The lyrics 'Imagine all the people living life in peace' perfectly align with the app's mission to create global unity through music.

event.description: Join millions around the world in a synchronized moment of song and unity. At the countdown to zero, people everywhere will step outside and sing together for 10-20 seconds, creating a powerful wave of unity that transcends borders, languages, and cultures.

purpose.mission: To create the first-ever real-time global singing event, coordinated entirely through a single countdown moment — no rehearsal, no instructions, just human connection.
purpose.vision: A global ritual in the making that speaks to a universal longing for connection, for shared emotion, for a break from solitude.
purpose.concept: A beautifully simple mobile app with a global countdown. At zero, people everywhere sing the same song for 10–20 seconds — outdoors, together, filmed by themselves or those around them. The goal is Unity. Emotion. Presence. A once-in-a-lifetime shared experience, born in the real world, powered by digital simplicity.

homePage.description: The main page where users can participate in the global event
functionality: Displays countdown timer to the event
- Create an account (name, email, password) or sign in
- Can allow location tracking or enter manually
Once participating, shows countdown with local event time
When countdown reaches zero, live lyrics system activates
Displays 'Be a Part of the Moment to Unify the World' message

mapPage.description: Interactive world map showing global participation
functionality: Shows real-time participation data from around the world
Displays countdown timer (days when 3+ days remain, hours:minutes:seconds when less than 3 days)
Shows local event time based on user's location
Updates automatically when participation data changes

sections.participationStatus: Shows 'Pledged to Participate' when user has joined

eventDetails.eventInformation: Detailed information about the app's purpose and vision
eventDetails.choiceOfSong: Explains why 'Imagine' was chosen as the song

features: 10-second countdown before lyrics appear
Plays 'Imagine.mp3' audio
Lyrics highlight in bold and blue as they're sung
Timing synchronized with the song
Practice tips displayed
All new users start with 1 friend: AI Choir Assistant
Recommended friends based on location proximity
Search bar to find friends
Add friends by:
- Scanning QR codes
- From recommended friends
- From group members
- Starting new conversations

fields: Specific Location (optional) - exact point where user will be during the event
editProfile.note: When location is changed, it updates everywhere: Profile, Home, and Map pages

settings.aiAssistantSettings: Configure OpenAI API key for full AI capabilities

qrCode.description: Share profile and add friends via QR codes
features: Each user has a unique, permanent QR code (format: WC-XXXXX)
My QR Code: Display your QR code to share
Scan QR Code: Scan others' QR codes to view their profile and add as friend
Works with both front and back cameras
Automatically redirects to scanned user's profile

cityGroups.description: Automatic groups created for each city
features: Automatically added when user sets location
Automatically removed/added when location changes
Poll system with city attractions (scaled by city size)
Users vote on where to gather in their city
Selected poll option automatically becomes user's 'Specific Location'
No messaging allowed - only poll voting
View all members and add them as friends
Create new groups with multiple friends
Send messages to group
View all members
Add members as friends
Start conversations with any friend
AI Choir Assistant chat (first friend for all users)
Private conversations stored locally
Search for friends to start conversations
Automatically added as first friend for all new users
Answers questions about:
- The event details and timing
- How to use app features
- Purpose and vision of World Choir
- How to participate
- App functionality
Requires OpenAI API key for full capabilities (configured in Settings)
Conversations are private and stored locally
Uses GPT-3.5-turbo model for intelligent responses

participationFlow.step2: Create account (name, email, password) or sign in
participationFlow.step3: - Option A: Allow location tracking (automatically detects city/country)
- Option B: Enter city and country manually
participationFlow.step4: Location is validated (city must exist in selected country)
participationFlow.step5: User is added to global participation data
participationFlow.step6: User is added to their city's group chat
participationFlow.step7: Countdown timer appears with local event time
participationFlow.step8: User can now use all app features

locationFeatures.timezoneConversion: Event time (16:00 UTC) automatically converts to user's local time based on their city
locationFeatures.validation: City-country combinations are validated using OpenStreetMap API
locationFeatures.allCountries: All countries in the world are available in dropdowns
locationFeatures.specificLocation: Optional field for exact gathering point (e.g., 'Central Park, near Bethesda Fountain')
locationFeatures.automaticUpdates: When location changes, it updates: Profile page, Home page local time, Map participation data, City group membership

technicalDetails.dataStorage: All data stored locally in browser (localStorage)
technicalDetails.authentication: Email and password-based, stored in localStorage
technicalDetails.privacy: No data shared externally except OpenAI API calls (if configured)
technicalDetails.qrCodes: Generated using external APIs, unique per user

importantNotes.eventTime: Always 16:00 UTC on June 15, 2026 - converts to local time automatically
importantNotes.songChoice: 'Imagine' by John Lennon - chosen for its message of unity and peace
importantNotes.participation: No audio recording - this is about participation and unity, not content creation
importantNotes.location: Only city is shown on global map, not exact coordinates
importantNotes.friends: New users start with only AI Choir Assistant, can add more later
importantNotes.cityGroups: Automatic, one per city, with poll for gathering locations
importantNotes.aiAssistant: Requires OpenAI API key in Settings for full capabilities

aboutEvent.whatIsTheWorldChoirEvent: It is a countdown that brings the world together - not online, but out into the streets, into balconies, parks, windows, and plazas - to sing. A moment shared, a memory made, a chorus echoed across borders.
aboutEvent.whyAreWeSingingImagine: We chose Imagine by John Lennon because it carries the message the world needs most - hope, unity, and the belief that even strangers can share the same heartbeat for a moment.
aboutEvent.whatIsThePurposeOfThisProject: The purpose of the App is to create an Event, that could potentially bring Unity, Emotion and Presence. A once-in-a-lifetime shared experience, born in the real world, powered by digital simplicity.
aboutEvent.isThisEventRealOrJustSymbolic: It is a real event, and we hope to continue providing this Events and Experiences for many years.
aboutEvent.howLongDoesTheEventLast: For a few minutes, and the whole world will pause, and became a choir. A reminder that there are no borders in music. A reminder that peace can start with something as small as your voice.

participation.doIHaveToBeAGoodSingerToJoin: Anyone can join, it's a moment to be shared with loved ones as well as strangers.
participation.howDoIJoinTheEvent: After opening the app click on Will Participate Button, and then either create an account, or log in into an already existing account
participation.canIJoinIfImLate: Yes, anyone can join, it doesn't matter when. It will be an Event to hopefully be repeated many times.
participation.canIJoinFromHome: Absolutely, anyone can join from all over the world.
participation.canIJoinEvenIfImAlone: Of course you can, and you will be a part of one of the biggest World Piece Movements ever
participation.doINeedHeadphones: No, but you can use them if you prefer
participation.canISingWithFriendsNextToMe: Absolutely, and we encourage you to do that.

countdown.howDoesTheCountdownWork: It works just like a regular countdown, and when it hits zero, people around the world sing the same song - outdoors, together, filmed by themselves or those around them.
countdown.whyIsMyCountdownDifferentFromMyFriends: It surely depends on the city they are from, since there is a difference on the Time Zones.
countdown.willTheAppNotifyMeBeforeTheEvent: You have an option to add notifications, and you will be notified about almost every new, and you will also get more notifications the closer you are to the event
countdown.canITestTheCountdown: Yes, absolutely, you have a Practice Countdown Button, so that whenever you want you can practice the song with the correct lyrics.
countdown.isTheTimeShownInUTCOrLocalTime: Yes, absolutely, we made sure to do that for you.

song.whatSongAreWeSinging: We chose Imagine by John Lennon because it carries the message the world needs most - hope, unity, and the belief that even strangers can share the same heartbeat for a moment.
song.whereCanISeeTheLyrics: You are able to see the lyrics on the Practice Countdown.
song.willTheMusicPlayAutomatically: It will play automatically, so all you need to do is to follow the lyrics, and enjoy the moment
song.doesTheAppPlayTheKaraoke: It doesn't quite work like Karaoke since you will be hearing John Lennon singing, but you will have a very similar experience.
song.canIChooseAnotherSong: For the First Event, this is the only available song.
song.canISingOtherSongs: In terms of the goal of our app, everyone should be singing the same song to create a worldwide moment. Nonetheless, if you feel that another song is more meaningful to you, you absolutely can choose it! Just remember that you will probably be the only one singing that specific song. Our advice is to wait until we, as an app, create a new event featuring the song you want.

friends.howDoIAddFriends: You have some different options to do that, from adding people that are in your City's Group Chat, or the easiest way to scan the QR Code in the Profile Page. You will also be able to find more people on recommended friends

privacy.canPeopleSeeMyPhoneNumber: All the private information will be kept to ourselves.
privacy.isMyVoiceRecorded: No it is not recorded, but you can record it if you want.
privacy.isTheEventAnonymous: No, it will be a worldwide Event.
privacy.willOtherPeopleHearMeSinging: The only way people will hear you sing is if you go sing in public. If you are asking while Practicing, no one will ever hear you.
privacy.whoCanSeeMyLocation: Anyone can see the exact city you are from, but no one can know your specific location.
privacy.doYouShareMyData: We recommend you to only share the data we ask for, nothing else.
privacy.doesTheAppRecordMyVoiceDuringTheEvent: No, for now on this version of the app, we still do not have the ability to do that.
privacy.canIReplayMySinging: No, for now on this version of the app, we still do not have the ability to do that.
privacy.doYouStoreMyAudio: No, for now on this version of the app, we still do not have the ability to do that.
privacy.doYouUseMyMicrophoneBeforeTheEvent: No, for now on this version of the app, we still do not have the ability to do that.

future.willThereBeOtherSongsInTheFuture: Yes there will be, on other Global Events, but for now we haven't chosen the future song.
future.willThereBeMoreEvents: Yes it will become an Annual Event, not exactly always on the same day, but every year from now on.
future.howOftenDoesThisHappen: At least it will happen once a year.
